type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Stacks: There were elevated ammonia concentrations in stack sampling in 2023 as compared to 2022. Variability in stack sampling methedology may be attributed to the variance in results. Fugitive: The plant operated more days in 2023 since 2022 was a maintenance turnaround year (less hours of operation). Spills: There was a 50 ton ammonia release in 2023 that inflated the number in comparison to 2022.
